name: Silkroad Nickel Ltd.
summary: Silkroad Nickel Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, mining, production, and sale of nickel ore. The company's nickel mining concession area consists of approximately 1,301 hectares in the Morowali Regency, Central Sulawesi, Indonesia. Silkroad Nickel Ltd. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Singapore. Silkroad Nickel Ltd. is a subsidiary of Far East Mining Pte. Ltd.
